---
title: "EagleSwing: Unified Golf Swing Analysis"
author: "Ali Zaidi"
date: "2025-09-19"
categories: [news, overview]
---

EagleSwing merges two codebases into a single, clean package for golf swing analysis:

- **eagle-swing**: Research library for biomechanical analysis (normalization, body metrics, temporal analysis)
- **golf-pipeline-final**: Production AWS pipeline (video labeling, swing detection, post-processing)

The unified `eagle_swing` package provides:

- **Data loading** that handles both PKL formats transparently
- **Swing detection** via wrist signal processing (Savitzky-Golay + peak finding)
- **Biomechanical analysis** with 17 metrics across rotation, posture, and linear categories
- **Statistical comparison** using SPM (Statistical Parametric Mapping)
- **Hand-raise detection** for post-swing scoring

```python
from eagle_swing.data.loader import load_pkl
from eagle_swing.detection.backswing import detect_backswings

kd = load_pkl("video.pkl")
result = detect_backswings("video.pkl", "video.MOV")
print(f"{result.n_swings} swings detected")
```

See the [docs site](https://azaidi06.github.io/dev-pipe/) for the full API reference and pipeline architecture.
